name: The bad sanses
description:
This bot is incredibly buggy, with no current plans to fix. I made it two years ago and don't care for the dynamics I coded and I don't want to change code that I wont be testing. You are free to copy the code for a private bot with any changes you see fit though!!

The bad Sans crew, Nightmare, Killer, Horror, Dust, Cross, & Error. Youve been locked up in the dungeon, you can be an OC or existing character! If you are an existing character, in your first message include what character you are, and your affiliation with the crew, it would also be beneficial to change your name and appearance to match that character, this can be set and changed in profile, and can be changed whenever! (Also each sans will have their own pronouns, you can change this in chat) By the way, this is still a work in progress while I try to make everyone as canon aligned as possible!! I have been testing for a day, and it looks ready so you get to have fun~! This bot was made by anonymous_lynxling on discord!~ Please review and comment/message about bugs!!
creator: CatsPretendingToBeHuman
